purpose: Define the stable Service/Repository boundary for selected Amazon data reads.
invariants: Workflow and report code consume the normalized service result, not provider-specific raw responses.
Every request is scoped to a project, selected fields, and a time range.
Repository adapters may read a provider but cannot decide business conclusions or write business state.
Provider, cache, row count, cost, and freshness metadata remain observable.
A request envelope contains references and query intent, never credentials or raw rows.
